mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT hd.*, tl.`name` AS laboratoryName FROM hk_door hd LEFT JOIN hk_door_laboratory_rel hr ON hd.index_code = hr.index_code LEFT JOIN test_laboratory tl ON hr.test_laboratory_id = tl.id ) tba
1=1
AND tba.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
AND tba.region_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{position},'%')
AND tba.laboratoryName is not null
AND tba.laboratoryName is null
